summary: Tested Drafts/Bozze safety system and film recovery features for CineWorld Studios. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend DraftsSection component renders correctly on /create-film page.
critical_code_review_comments: Scheduler fix verified: Lines 854-855 in scheduler_tasks.py now use locally-defined film_hype_boost and film_strategy_bonus instead of undefined variables from series scope
Scheduler fix verified: auto_cleanup_corrupted_projects now moves films to 'proposed' status instead of 'discarded' (safety net)
seed_data_creation: Test drafts created via pytest for user testdrafts@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Drafts/Bozze safety system fully implemented. Backend endpoints: GET /api/film-pipeline/drafts (returns drafts + stuck_films), GET /api/film-pipeline/diagnose (diagnostic info), POST /api/film-pipeline/admin/recover-all (recovers lost films), POST /api/film-pipeline/draft (create/update draft), DELETE /api/film-pipeline/draft/{id} (delete draft). Frontend DraftsSection component renders on /create-film page with 'BOZZE & RECUPERO' header, shows draft items with Resume/Delete buttons, and has Diagnostica/Recupera Film Persi buttons when expanded. Scheduler fixes prevent films from disappearing after 'tempismo perfetto' timing.

scheduler_code_verification.auto_cleanup_uses_proposed: PASS - Lines 1098, 1127: status set to 'proposed' not 'discarded'
